news.title: AppLovin’s Ethical Reset Tests Market Faith In AI Growth Story
news.summary: CapitalWatch retracted money laundering accusations against AppLovin and issued an apology, removing a recent reputational overhang. AppLovin reported strong fourth quarter results, with revenue coming in ahead of prior expectations and management issuing upbeat guidance. The company highlighted AI driven platform progress and new e commerce efforts, even as the share price sold off on price target cuts and competitive concerns.
